subject: Quick idea for Brightline Logistics's data team
body:
Hi {first_name},

Noticed Brightline Logistics requested a demo — given your team's work with Snowflake, thought it was worth a quick note to the VP Operations.

Happy to share how teams with a similar setup have approached this. Worth 15 minutes this week?

Best,
{sender_name}
reasons: requested a demo; high recent engagement (visits + opens); strong ICP fit (size/funding/ARR potential); existing stack overlap (Snowflake); touched within the last few days
